_note: Previous artifact had GCC version mismatch across compiler/methodology fields and inconsistent ConnectBlock numbers. Cleared for fresh controlled run.
_regenerate_with: cmake --preset ultrafast-bench-lto && python3 ci/run_bitcoin_core_bench.py --compiler GCC-14.2 --runs 5 --output docs/BITCOIN_CORE_BENCH_RESULTS.json
